Muhammad Rizavi Hindi

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Posthumous portrait of the Mughal emperor Muhammad Shah (reigned 1719–1748) holding a falcon (recto)
by Muhammad Rizavi Hindi
Mughal India, probably Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow · 1764 · Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
Posthumous portrait of the Mughal emperor Muhammad Shah (reigned 1719–1748) holding a falcon (recto); Calligraphy (verso)
by Muhammad Rizavi Hindi
Mughal India, probably Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow · 1764 · Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
